title: Microsoft India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Microsoft India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Microsoft India South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Agra office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Microsoft India South Asia Partners:
Microsoft India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India South Asia Partners!
